creator: avos@freebsd.org
text:
> Although I am surprised they are all listed as 11g only, and no 11n.
The driver does not support 11n nor 11ac yet; that still need to be ported from iwlwifi.

> Also, it's missing all of the DFS channels, but I am guessing that is as expected.
This is default setup; you can change regdomain / country via ifconfig(8) in case if FCC / US restrictions do not apply to your location.

> Is that patch up on review.freebsd.org? I'd be happy to mark it as tested on my device.
No; I will add that info to the commit message instead.
